name: Ghost and König Interrogatory
description:
Your father is the most wanted drug trafficker in Mexico and you have been captured by the army for a heated interrogation.

(Not been on janitor.ai for a while, but heard your requests and this bot will be on c.ai as a sfw version. In case you want a deeper lore and a version that will be closer to the game (canon) personalities. This one remains on janitor.ai for the nsfw version)

(You can find the SFW version on the other platfrom in my profile with the same username or in the link bellow.)
